hero.name: Alastair Lewis
hero.tagline: Frontend architecture, accessibility, and building things that scale.

about.label: Background
about.title: About Me
about.p1: Senior Software Engineer at Shopify. I build frontend architecture and design systems, the kind of work where a clean abstraction can save a thousand engineers an hour each. Polished UIs at serious scale. That's the stuff.
about.p2: Got my start at IBM, where I shipped across airlines, banking, nonprofits, and a moonshot security project through Extreme Blue. Lots of domains, one takeaway: great frontend is equal parts craft and systems thinking.
about.p3: Toronto-based. Golfer, skier, wannabe house DJ. I like to work remotely around the world, ideally within range of a first tee and a flat white.
about.stack: React, Angular, TypeScript, GraphQL, Node.js, Ruby on Rails, Python, Java, C/C++

form.message_placeholder: What would you like to say?
form.success: Message sent! I'll get back to you soon.

genesis.title: Genesis
genesis.desc_0: Led the frontend team on Air Canada's next-generation booking engine, built by IBM on AWS.
genesis.desc_1: Now serving customers worldwide and accounting for Air Canada's primary revenue stream, Genesis delivers a rebuilt frontend for performance and accessibility, backed by a modular GraphQL API layer.
genesis.desc_2: The first Air Canada project to introduce Generative AI into the SDLC.

aeroplanDashboard.title: Aeroplan Dashboard
aeroplanDashboard.desc_0: Delivered key functionality on Air Canada's Aeroplan loyalty dashboard.
aeroplanDashboard.desc_1: Contributed as the program grew from 4 million to 8.5 million members, establishing Aeroplan as one of the top 10 airline loyalty programs in the world.

role0.title: Senior Software Engineer
role0.bullet_0: Work on the Inventory team within Shopify's core platform, building foundational infrastructure that powers merchants across the globe.
role0.bullet_1: Champion the technical direction of high-impact projects that expand Shopify's platform offering, driving GMV growth and merchant acquisition by solving real merchant business needs.
role0.bullet_2: Mentor junior developers and help establish best practices and patterns across the team.

role0.title: Managing Technical Consultant
role0.bullet_0: One of the fastest-growing consultants in the firm, progressing from Associate to Managing Consultant within 4 years.
role0.bullet_1: Drove technical project delivery across a diverse portfolio of clients spanning major Canadian airlines, multiple major Canadian banks, and non-profits.
role0.bullet_2: Led high-profile, high-visibility engagements under significant executive scrutiny, consistently delivering on IBM's most complex mandates.
role0.bullet_3: Helped diversify and grow IBM's book of business across key accounts, expanding engagements into new workstreams and disciplines.
role0.bullet_4: Mentored incoming developers across the consulting practice, establishing technical standards and onboarding best practices.

role1.title: Extreme Blue Technical Intern
role1.bullet_0: Developed a moonshot machine learning product over 4 months, leveraging neural networks to classify dangerous incoming server connections for IBM's Guardium security platform.
role1.bullet_1: Helped build the business case for the product and pitched it to a suite of IBM executives in New York City, receiving high praise.
role1.bullet_2: A version of the project is now offered as part of IBM's security product portfolio.
